basics.name: Michelle Chen
basics.label: Science Educator & College Application Mentor
basics.summary: An experienced A-Level Chemistry and Biology educator with over ten years of teaching experience, specialising in college application strategy and extracurricular research project design for high school students pursuing science programmes.

work.name: Education Company
work.summary: Expanded role beyond classroom teaching to provide comprehensive college application support for science-focused high school students.
highlights: Teach A-Level Chemistry and Biology to high school students with a focus on conceptual understanding and exam excellence
Develop individualised college application strategies for students targeting Biology, Chemistry, Biochemistry, Biomedical Science, Medicinal Chemistry, and related programmes
Write and refine personal statements, helping students articulate their academic interests, motivations, and goals in a compelling voice
Design bespoke extracurricular research projects tailored to each student's intended field of study, mentoring them through the full project lifecycle from hypothesis to conclusion

work.name: A-Level Centre
work.summary: Delivered A-Level Chemistry curriculum to secondary school students over six years.
highlights: Prepared students for public examinations with a focus on conceptual understanding and exam technique
Provided individual academic guidance and subject enrichment support
